items.prompt: Compute the sum of the squares of the integers 1 through 100.
Compute the 20th Fibonacci number, where F(1) = F(2) = 1.
Count how many prime numbers are strictly less than 1000.
Find the 10,000th positive integer (in increasing order, starting from 1) whose prime factorization contains no prime other than 2, 3, or 5.
